title: Zhan Shen: Fanchen Shenyu II

synonyms: I Learn To Kill Gods in an Asylum
Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen
alternative_titles.ja: 斩神之凡尘神域 第2季

synopsis:
After the Cangnan crisis was resolved, Lin Qiye completed the year-long Night Watchman training and assessment at Jinnan Mountain and became a formal Night Watchman. He then returned to Squad 136 and, together with his partners, embarked on a new battle against the Church of the Ancient Gods... A new Western evil god made his debut, and the pinnacle of humanity gathered in Cangnan, where a massive storm of disaster was quietly brewing.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
